subject: Social Sciences
title: Neighbouring Countries
tagline: Explore the countries that share a border with South Africa!

pins.name: Namibia
facts: Namibia is home to the Namib Desert, one of the oldest deserts in the world.
Namibia gained independence from South Africa in 1990.

pins.name: Botswana
facts: Most of Botswana is covered by the Kalahari Desert.
Botswana is famous for the Okavango Delta, a huge inland river delta.

pins.name: Zimbabwe
facts: Victoria Falls, one of the world's largest waterfalls, sits on Zimbabwe's border with Zambia.
Great Zimbabwe is an ancient stone city that gave the country its name.

pins.name: Mozambique
facts: Mozambique has a long coastline on the Indian Ocean.
Portuguese is the official language of Mozambique.

pins.name: Eswatini
facts: Eswatini is one of the last absolute monarchies in the world.
Eswatini was called Swaziland until it changed its name in 2018.

pins.name: Lesotho
facts: Lesotho is completely surrounded by South Africa.
Lesotho is called the 'Kingdom in the Sky' because of its high mountains.
